supply_chain.dependencies: Dependent on limited number of contract manufacturers for hardware products; reliance on specific suppliers for critical components; manufacturing plants in Dayton, Ohio and Danderyd, Sweden for optics-based and GPS products
supply_chain.risks: Supply chain disruptions due to geopolitical conditions (Russia-Ukraine conflict); extended delivery times for components; increased freight costs; potential inability to obtain products or components to meet customer delivery requirements; reduced control over pricing and delivery schedules; discontinuation or increased prices for components; inflationary cost increases; trade restrictions, tariffs, or duties; scarcity or significant price increases of raw materials; transportation failures; severe weather conditions or natural disasters; civil unrest, military conflicts, geopolitical developments, war, or terrorism

regulatory_risks: Compliance with differing local laws and regulations including data privacy requirements, labor laws, and local content
Export control laws and U.S. export law restrictions limiting destinations and customer types
U.S. Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) and U.K. Bribery Act compliance
Evolving and potentially conflicting data privacy and data security laws (California Consumer Privacy Rights Act, EU data privacy regulations)
International transfers of personal data compliance challenges
Functional safety regulation for automated and autonomous operation products
CE certification requirements for GNSS receivers and data communications products in European community
FCC product type certification and end user licensing requirements
Compliance with evolving product regulations in major markets
Income tax regulations across multiple U.S. and foreign jurisdictions
Radio frequency spectrum allocation and usage regulations (ITU, FCC, NTIA)
Potential harmful interference from terrestrial wireless operations in GNSS spectrum
Environmental, social, and governance (ESG) related laws and regulations including climate change and cybersecurity disclosure requirements
Trade barriers, duties, tariffs, and import/export licensing requirements or restrictions
Intellectual property protection laws varying by country

sanction_risks: Sanctions on Russia due to Ukraine conflict impacting suppliers and international trade
Trade sanctions and embargoes affecting component availability
Potential restrictions on use of Russian GLONASS and Chinese BeiDou GNSS signals
U.S. government restrictions on operations in certain countries
Restrictions on ability to repatriate earnings from certain countries
Heightened trade tensions and tariffs between U.S. and trading partners
Potential non-U.S. customers favoring domestic suppliers due to government policies
